metadata.name: Correct an Error in a Patient Chart

description: An HIM specialist discovers a scanned document was accidentally filed in the wrong patient's chart.

nodes.task_description: Identify the incorrect document in the first patient's chart.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the document that needs to be moved.

nodes.task_description: Remove the document from the incorrect chart, noting the reason as 'Chart correction'.
Locate the correct patient's chart and upload the document.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent files the document in the correct patient's record, resolving the error.
